visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand in front of a Costco Wholesale entrance. The woman on the left wears a white bucket hat and a white t-shirt, excitedly holding a thick fan of 1000 TWD bills near her face. The woman on the right has long dark hair and a neutral but pleasant expression. Bright overhead warehouse lighting illuminates the scene. (2) A rapid series of product showcase shots begins, featuring an LG air purifier, PS5 game bundles, and large household appliances like a Bayside electric fireplace. The setting remains a warehouse interior with high-shelf industrial racks. (3) The sequence continues with high-granularity shots of electronics including Philips TVs, ASUS laptops, and kitchen appliances like Electrolux washing machines and Samsung refrigerators. Each shot is centered on the product, often including the original Costco price tags in the background. (4) The montage transitions to personal care items like electric toothbrushes, kitchen gadgets like air fryers, and home furniture such as chairs and mattresses. (5) The final segment displays seasonal and bulky items including kids' electric cars, luggage sets, and LED Christmas decorations like trees and reindeer. The lighting is consistently bright and even across all product displays.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 折扣金額破百萬！ 好市多 千元折扣商品 11/24～11/30 黑五特報第五彈. [Logo]: @cocowine. (2) [Subtitle]: LG AIR PURIFIER 360度空氣清淨機 AS651DWHO 原價17899 -3700 特價14199. (3) [Subtitle]: PS5主機遊戲 雙手把同捆組 含NBA 2K26 數位遊戲券及無線雙手把 原價19199 -3400 特價15799. (4) [Subtitle]: BAYSIDE 紅外線電暖爐 原價16899 -3900 特價12999. (5) [Subtitle]: AIRMATE 艾美特 對流式電暖器 HC12222FUR 原價5899 -1200 特價4699. (6) [Subtitle]: 飛利浦 55吋 MINILED顯示器 原價22999 -4600 特價18399. (7) [Subtitle]: 飛利浦 75吋 MINILED顯示器 75MLED800 原價44799 -9000 特價35799. (8) [Subtitle]: OVO PROJECTOR HD小蘋果投影機 U3 原價12499 -2500 特價9999. (9) [Subtitle]: ASUS 15.6吋 筆記型電腦 R7/8G/512GB 原價21399 -4400 特價16999.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing at the intro.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one in a white bucket hat and t-shirt, the other with long dark hair in casual attire.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco Wholesale entrance and various warehouse interior sections featuring high industrial shelving, product display tables, and appliance aisles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals open with an excited greeting. An upbeat electronic pop BGM with a strong four-on-the-floor kick drum (approx. 128 BPM) begins immediately. (2) A transition sound effect, a sharp 'pop', signals a shift to a male narrator. The male voice delivers a rapid-fire list of products and prices with high articulation clarity and rhythmic cadence. (3) Continuous 'ding' and 'whoosh' sound effects punctuate every scene cut, perfectly synchronized with the fast-paced visual montage. The BGM remains constant, maintaining high energy and excitement. (4) The male narrator's speech rate remains extremely high, mimicking a promotional broadcast style. The vocal tone is persuasive and energetic, with frequent rising intonations to emphasize 'special price' figures. (5) The audio concludes with a final 'ding' effect as the BGM fades out sharply after the last product description, matching the quick editing pace of the video.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a high-density shopping guide and promotional advertisement for Costco's Black Friday event. By combining an energetic intro with a rapid-fire, well-categorized catalog of discounted products, it aims to create a sense of urgency and excitement (FOMO) for viewers to visit the store between November 24th and 30th.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed pricing, store location, and specific discount dates are provided throughout the video.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-intensity short-form marketing content optimized for social media consumption with frequent visual and auditory cues.
